description_long: This is a clear plastic bottle filled with a yellow liquid, labeled as a pineapple drink. The bottle features a bright yellow screw cap and a vibrant label with the brand 'Unifree SACE' prominently displayed on the front, along with images of pineapples and green leaves to indicate the flavor. The label wraps around the bottle, with the front showcasing the product name and flavor, while the back and sides display nutritional information, recycling symbols, and additional product details. The bottle is cylindrical with a slightly rounded shoulder and a narrow neck leading up to the cap. The label design uses a combination of yellow and green hues, making the product visually appealing and easy to identify as a tropical juice. The overall appearance suggests a single-serving, ready-to-drink juice bottle commonly found in urban convenience stores or vending machines.
description: A clear plastic bottle of pineapple juice with a yellow screw cap and a vibrant label featuring pineapples and green accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Unifree SACE' brand label, pineapple imagery, and product name clearly.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the nutritional information panel and barcode on the label.
description_view_2: Angled rear-side view highlighting recycling symbols and additional product details.
description_view_3: Side view showing more of the label's text and green accent graphics, with less focus on branding.
